chapters.title: Too Many Tasks
chapters.content: Friday morning started with ten unread emails and three urgent tasks. Oliver knew it would be a very long day.

chapters.title: Unexpected Delay
chapters.content: Just before lunch, a key client requested major changes. The deadline stayed the same, but the work doubled.

chapters.title: Done at Last
chapters.content: At 8 PM, Oliver finally sent the final report. Exhausted but satisfied, he closed his laptop and welcomed the weekend.
